# PartRenderer.Subparts

**Structure**

Collection of part parameters for the subparts of a part. The index is the subpart number (determined by the loader)

## Declaration

```swift
struct Subparts
```

## Conforms To

- BidirectionalCollection
- Collection
- RandomAccessCollection
- Sequence
